Notice Of Hearing On Request (Application) For Court Judgment After Default
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for hearing on request for court judgment after default.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:51:37 a.m. and concluding at 10:16:22 a.m.

Plaintiff Grasshopper Escapement, LLC represented by Matthew James, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Modern System Development not appearing.

MICHAEL DEARING is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff filed dismissal as to First, Second, Third Causes of Action and DOES 1 through 50 on Oct-11-2022.

Plaintiff present offer of proof.
Declaration of Michael Dearing is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Agreement re: Installation
Plaintiff's Exhibit B - Assignment Agreement

The Court rules on Plaintiff's requests for judicial notice as follows:

1 - Certification of Records
2 - Original Complaint - MOOT - First Amended Complaint filed Jan-08-2020
3 - Answer filed Jul-10-2019
4 - First Amended Complaint
5 - Default entered Mar-25-2020

The Court further takes judicial of proof of service and the dismissal of DOES.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Grasshopper Escapement, LLC, and against Defendant Dimensional Dental Management, LLC, a limited liability company.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation is awarded judgment against Defendant Modern System Development as follows:

Damages/Principal: $88,831.61
Attorney Fees: $54,198.00
Costs: $570.00
CCP Section 1029.8 Penalty: $10,000.00

Total Judgment: $153,599.61

Proposed Judgment to be submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.
